English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Pittsburg, Shawmut & Northern Railroad Company papers
Allen, C. F. H. (Charles Francis Hitchcock), 1895-1979
2161
2.5 cubic feet. 2.5 cubic feet.
1872-1960. Letters, pamphlets, broadsides, maps, newspapers, and photographs. Allen's history of the railroad, with research notes and correspondence; a corporate history. Railroad material includes correspondence, reports, financial records, employee records, timetables, pamphlets, newspapers, broadsides, maps, blueprints, charts, and photographs. Also records of predecessor, affiliated, or otherwise connected railroads. Collection material in English 2074786
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
S. Goodman
Date completed:
Aug. 1975
EAD encoding:
Peter Martinez, Mar. 27, 2002
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Allen's history of the railroad, with research notes and correspondence; a corporate history. Railroad material includes correspondence, reports, financial records, employee records, timetables, pamphlets, newspapers, broadsides, maps, blueprints, charts, and photographs. Also records of predecessor, affiliated, or otherwise connected railroads.
Cite As:
Pittsburg, Shawmut & Northern Railroad Company papers, #2161. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Timetables. Photographs. Maps. Broadsides. Blueprints. Railroads -- History. Railroads -- Employees. Railroads -- United States. Pittsburg, Shawmut & Northern Railroad Company
2074786 <<<<<<< HEAD TimetablesOriginal timetable printed on red cardboard of the Buffalo and Susquehanna Railroad Co.June 15, 1896.Photocopy of the Buffalo and Susquehanna Railroad Co. effectiveJune 15, 1896.Loose-leaf notebooksA count of all the photographs and material other than actual text in these volumes follows. THESE PHOTOGRAPHS AND OTHER MATERIAL MUST BE COUNTED EACH TIME ANY OF THESE VOLUMES IS REMOVED FROM THE STACKS AND RECOUNTED BEFORE THEY ARE RETURNED TO THE STACKS (see note signed by E.M.F. in box with books).
Scope and Contents
1. Contains material relating to the predecessor roads and subsequent affiliated roads to the Pittsburg, Shawmut & Northern Railroad; incl. 156 pp. typescript of text by Mr. Allen and other items as noted below.
Scope and Contents
2. Contains a complete history of the Pittsburg, Shawmut & Northern R.R. itself. pp. 157-254 + illustrations, etc. as noted below.
Scope and Contents
3. The balance of this book consists of photographs, railroad ephemera and letters. The following page numbers are, therefore, my own and serve only to locate the material listed. The pages bear no numbers or other means of identification. THESE PHOTOGRAPHS AND OTHER MATERIAL MUST BE COUNTED EACH TIME ANY OF THESE VOLUMES IS REMOVED FROM THE STACKS AND RECOUNTED BEFORE THEY ARE RETURNED TO THE STACKS (see note signed by E.M.F. in box with books).
Scope and Contents
1. Contains material relating to the predecessor roads and subsequent affiliated roads to the Pittsburg, Shawmut & Northern Railroad; incl. 156 pp. typescript of text by Mr. Allen and other items as noted below.
Scope and Contents
2. Contains a complete history of the Pittsburg, Shawmut & Northern R.R. itself. pp. 157-254 + illustrations, etc. as noted below.
Scope and Contents
3.
